# RoExpress

> A type-safe, rate-limited, Express.js-style RPC framework for Roblox. MIT licensed and free to use.

## What is RoExpress?

RoExpress replaces scattered RemoteEvents in Roblox games with a single disciplined pipeline. One reliable RemoteEvent handles all request/response traffic. One UnreliableRemoteEvent handles all broadcasts. Every request is automatically versioned, rate-limited, and routed.

- DevForum: https://devforum.roblox.com/t/roexpress/4646082
- License: MIT

## Modules

- App: Server-side request routing, middleware, and server push
- Network: Client-side request/response with callbacks and timeout
- Broadcast: Unreliable server-to-client fire-and-forget events
- Listener: Client-side handler for both push and broadcast events
- Router: Typed params (number, boolean, vector2, vector3, color3, cframe), wildcards, globs, pattern constraints
- Codec: LZ77 buffer compression, opt-in per route
- Bridge: Shared singleton internal event bus with Wait/WaitUntil/WaitFirst yieldable variants
- Tamper: Server-side exploit detection with 8 reason types across immediate and pattern tiers
- TokenBucket: Per-instance rate limiter with grant utilities
- Base64: Shared encode/decode utility

## Version history

- v2.0.0 (2026-05-30): Router, typed params, server push, Codec compression, Bridge event bus, Tamper exploit detection, instantiable TokenBucket, blockable middleware
- v1.6.0 (2026-05-19): Initial release — App, Network, Broadcast, Listener, TokenBucket, Base64

## Installation

Wally:
```toml
[dependencies]
RoExpress = "unofficialrobloxtutor/roexpress@2.0.0"
```

## Language

Luau (Roblox's scripting language, a typed superset of Lua 5.1)

## License

MIT — free to use, modify, and distribute
